name: Personal Group Holdings Plc
summary: Personal Group Holdings Plc provides short-term accident and health insurance services, SaaS products, and salary sacrifice technology products in the United Kingdom. The company operates through Core Insurance, IT Salary Sacrifice, SaaS, and Other segments. It offers insurance products, including hospital cash plans, convalescence plans, and death benefit plans. The company also operates employee experience platform that offers a range of products and services to support the physical, financial, mental and social needs of workers; and digital platform that helps clients to engage with teams, recognize exceptional talent, and motivate people, as well as provides a suite of communications tools that offer snapshot surveys and targeted communications. In addition, it provides Hapi Hub, a cloud-based management information reporting tool. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Milton Keynes, the United Kingdom.
